creator: mwisnicki+freebsd@gmail.com
text:
On Mon, Jul 14, 2008 at 04:40,  <rafan@freebsd.org> wrote:
> Synopsis: [PATCH] mail/mail-notification: update to 5.4
>
> State-Changed-From-To: open->closed
> State-Changed-By: rafan
> State-Changed-When: Mon Jul 14 02:40:42 UTC 2008
> State-Changed-Why:
> Committed. Thanks!
>
> http://www.freebsd.org/cgi/query-pr.cgi?pr=125489
>

Thanks, but you omitted one important patch file
(files/patch-po_pl.po). Please re-add it and bump portrevision.
